nodes.name: Webhook — Trigger Proposal
nodes.notes:
Dipanggil dari WF1 (intent=REQUEST_PROPOSAL) atau manual dari dashboard.
Payload: { from, clientName, phoneNumberId, extracted, rabAvg, feeAvg, totalFee }

nodes.name: Carbone — Render PDF
nodes.notes:
Carbone.io gratis 100 render/bulan.
Daftar di https://carbone.io -> API key di Settings.
Credentials: Header Name = 'carbone-version', Value = '4'
Authorization header = 'Bearer YOUR_CARBONE_KEY'

Untuk memakai ini, perlu upload template .docx dulu ke Carbone,
lalu ganti URL ke /render/{templateId}.
Alternatif: pakai node HTML-to-PDF di bawah.

nodes.name: HTML2PDF — Generate PDF
nodes.notes:
Alternatif Carbone. Gratis tier tersedia di https://html2pdf.app
API Key simpan di n8n Variables: $vars.HTML2PDF_API_KEY

Output: binary file 'pdfFile' yang siap di-upload ke WA.

nodes.name: WA — Upload PDF to Meta
nodes.notes:
Upload PDF ke Meta Media API dulu,
dapat media_id, baru kirim ke client.

nodes.name: Sheets — Log Proposal History
nodes.notes:
Buat sheet 'proposal_history' di spreadsheet.
Kolom: proposal_no | phone | client_name | building_type | tier | area_sqm | rab_avg | fee_avg | total_fee | sent_at | status | valid_until

nodes.name: Notify Dashboard
nodes.notes: Ganti localhost:3000 dengan URL dashboard Anda di VPS.

nodes.name: Wait 2 Days
nodes.notes: Auto follow-up 2 hari setelah proposal dikirim
